name: Miller's Fantasy: PARTY
short_description: Discover the secrets of the city's most famous park! Don't let Olliver meet his end in this park, or follow what must be done
detailed_description:
• Discover the secrets of the city's most famous park!

    Prepare your keys, because this game has a QTE system in its most difficult parts, collect all the items on the maps to discover secrets in each one of them, be prepared for the 2 endings and find out which one is the real one!

    The QTE system is a mechanic that will appear in some parts of the game, but they will be very notable for the parts in which they appear, the keys will be shown on your screen, click quickly or click until you can't anymore!!!

Guide Olliver to the darkest places in the park, see your favorite minigames transform into grotesque things, survive after discovering the truth, escape from Woozsly and discover which of the endings is true, collect items to discover more about this story, get the achievements and discover secrets in them too, this game has a lot of history, so take your time to complete it, there are secrets that unlock new gameplays!

And don't forget, playing once won't be enough to discover all the secrets this game hides.

supported_languages:
English, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
